Alle Jobs in nur einer Suche. Brammibal's Donuts is a vegan donut company founded in Berlin in 2015. Since then we have grown a lot and continue to do so: we run 8 cafés, a huge bakery and an office in Berlin and expanded to Hamburg in October 2022, where we now run 5 cafés and our second bakery. Become part of our journey to change the perception of plant-based food - one donut at a time. Jobsuche der Bundesagentur für Arbeit.
